title: Claude Cowork setup: the only 2 files you need
summary: Jeff Su demonstrates a Claude Cowork setup that uses two plain text files: CLAUDE.md for instructions that route different working modes (trip planning, email drafting, etc.) and MEMORY.md to persist active projects and decisions across sessions. The system automatically loads contextual workstations based on task type.
